title: juncus uliginosus repens
intro: Juncus uliginosus repens, also known as creeping rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. The creeping rush plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat respiratory issues, and act as a natural diuretic. Creeping rush can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is often used in conjunction with other herbs for a holistic approach to health.
